_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Provide input and assist in post-action effectiveness assessments.
reference_document_element_description: Coordinate regulatory examination responses, including information request fulfillment, examiner access management, findings response preparation, and corrective action plan development.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI RC domain. RC-T-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-S-007 (LS, cosine: 0.475), RC-S-006 (RC, cosine: 0.456).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.9/10 (raw 0.486). Shared vocabulary: [action]. DCWF-only terms [assessments, assist, effectiveness, input, post, provide] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, coordinate, corrective, development, examination, examiner] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.877 (P=0.895, R=0.860). P exceeds R by 0.034 — the DCWF element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Provide input and assist in post-action effectiveness assessments." and "Coordinate regulatory examination responses, including information request fulfi" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.587 > STS 0.486 (gap +0.101). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [action] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.7%. Shared tokens: [action]. DCWF-only: [assessments, assist, effectiveness, input, post, provide]. WIDAI-only: [access, coordinate, corrective, development, examination, examiner].
